author: y4rr
content: B.5 cleanup complete. Closed: #860 (ResNet BN param count), #861 #863 #865 #866 #868 (B.5.b shape/finite/determinism conformance for 5 modern architectures). B.5.c+e and B.5.d already closed in prior commits. Deferred with follow-up: #862 (DenseNet, #935), #864 (Inception, #936). Full logit-parity for B.5.b deferred to #930–#934.
